body: A short readiness probe was added so the exhibit-catalog ingestion job reports green before docent tours rely on it. The endpoint returns the last successful sync time and record count.
title: Add health check endpoint to data pipeline

body: Step-by-step runbook for releasing the booking service, covering pre-flight checks, the blue-green switch, and rollback if tour reservations fail.
title: Document new deployment runbook

body: Volunteer login depends on the shared auth library; this note records the version bump that closes the reported vulnerability and the smoke tests run afterward.
title: Update auth library to patch CVE

body: The museum homepage hero image was reserving no space before load, pushing the tour-booking button. A fixed aspect ratio resolves the shift on mobile.
title: Fix layout shift on landing hero

body: Step-by-step runbook for releasing the booking service, covering pre-flight checks, the blue-green switch, and rollback if tour reservations fail.
title: Document new deployment runbook

body: Intermittent failures in the web test suite traced to a race in the exhibit-search fixture; retries were removed in favor of an explicit wait.
title: Investigate flaky CI runs on the web suite

body: Intermittent failures in the web test suite traced to a race in the exhibit-search fixture; retries were removed in favor of an explicit wait.
title: Investigate flaky CI runs on the web suite

body: How to connect the docent roster to the shared scheduler so tour shifts at the museum sync automatically with volunteer availability.
title: Set up the docent scheduling integration

body: Reference for the tour-booking endpoint: request fields for party size and exhibit slot, response codes, and the confirmation payload returned to guests.
title: API reference for the tour-booking endpoint

body: Walkthrough for adding a restored aircraft to the exhibit catalog, from photographing the airframe to publishing the searchable record.
title: Walkthrough: import a new exhibit into the catalog

body: Configure SSO so museum volunteers use one login across the scheduler, catalog, and booking tools, with role mapping for docents and admins.
title: Configure single sign-on for volunteer accounts

body: Lists the environment variables the booking service reads, including database credentials, the calendar API key, and the public museum hours.
title: Environment variables for the booking service

body: Tutorial that builds a faceted search page over the exhibit archive, wiring filters for era, aircraft type, and gallery location.
title: Tutorial: build a faceted search page from scratch

body: Plan for moving the exhibit and gift-shop indices to the new schema, including a reindex window scheduled outside museum opening hours.
title: Migrate the search index to the new schema

body: Describes rate limits and cursor-based pagination for the public museum API used by partner sites listing tours and exhibits.
title: Rate limits and pagination for the public API

body: Procedure to restore the booking database from the most recent nightly snapshot and verify that existing tour reservations remain intact.
title: Restore the booking database from a nightly backup

body: Steps to link a volunteer Google Calendar to the scheduler so docent shifts and gallery tours appear alongside personal events.
title: Connect Google Calendar to the volunteer scheduler

body: Documents the webhook fired when a tour booking completes, including guest count, exhibit slot, and the signed payload fields.
title: Webhook payload format for completed bookings

body: Arizona does not observe daylight saving, so events were drifting by an hour; this note fixes the timezone handling for Phoenix-area tours.
title: Troubleshoot timezone drift on Phoenix events
